title: Xenial Garlicky Chinese Pork Ma La Tang
description: A garlicky, molten, monsoon Chinese dish featuring clotted cream, mushimono-steam, and gluten-free-friendly ingredients, served in a traditional ma-la-tang form in a wok vessel.
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the pork shoulder slices and stir-fry until browned.
Add the soy sauce, ma la tang sauce, and clotted cream, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the Xenial Garlicky Chinese Pork Ma La Tang hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F and let it rest for 3 minutes before serving.
